name: Tim Kaine
subject: We Are Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

This time of year, I do a lot of reflecting about family -- and I have a lot to be thankful for. One of the great things about raising kids has been seeing them go from three small children in Richmond to three cool adults with lives of their own. This year, Anne and I are lucky to get to spend Thanksgiving (and our 34th wedding anniversary!) in Minneapolis with one of our sons and the life he's built there. I'm so proud of all my kids, and so thankful to have a healthy family to spend time with during the holiday season.

And these days, I'm not just a proud dad -- I'm proud of you, too! Truly, I am enormously proud and grateful to have your support and your friendship. Because of your hard work, we've made great strides toward electing leaders all across the country who will serve with compassion, no matter how polarized or difficult the time. And I think we should all feel proud of that progress we've been able to make.

I hope you find some time over the next days to relax and spend time with the ones you love. And as we count our blessings, it's also important to remember the hundreds of families in California who can't spend this holiday with their loved ones because of the devastating ongoing wildfires. **_If you're looking for a way to help, this link will help you split a donation between many organizations and charities that are supporting those affected:_** [**_https://secure.timkaine.com/Support-California_**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e37421f/4069913470/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-ca-wildfires?refcode=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomSupportCalifornia&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving")

Thank you for being with me, year after year. With my warmest wishes for a happy Thanksgiving,

_Tim_
---
* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e37421e/4069913470/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e37421d/4069913470/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e37421c/4069913470/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e374213/4069913470/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e374212/4069913470/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175e/3e0906/7a20c61a/3e374211/4069913470/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving&source=20181121_1_NA_TK_Thanksgiving") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Judiciary Committee
body:
Judiciary Committee No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-yd/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-j/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [Judiciary Committee](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-i/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [So What Are We Likely to See in The New Congress?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [T](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-n/)[hank You So Very Much!](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-p/)
First, thank you so very much for your support in this race. I'm so grateful for the opportunity to continue to represent you in Washington.

It was a late night last night watching all the election results coming in from around the state and across the nation. So I'll keep this week's blog short. Click the link below to read my thoughts on the night's results. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-m/)
### [A Ceasefire, Quickly Broken](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-c/)
I just got home from a rally at a place in downtown Cincinnati on 6th Street, called The Backstage Event Center. Among the Republican candidates who spoke at this Boisterous event, one week before a major election, were Congressman Warren Davis, Senator Rob Portman, Ohio Attorney General Mike DeWine, and oh yeah, me. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-q/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-a/)
### [Two Weeks Out - So How's the Election Looking?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-f/)
A lot better than it looked two months ago, or two weeks ago for that matter. I think things are trending in the right direction. The Democrats' advantage on the generic ballot has narrowed significantly - from double digits to low single digits. And in the so-called battleground congressional districts, the ones that are hotly contested this time around (like mine), and will decide which party controls the House after the election, the generic ballot is essentially a dead heat. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-z/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-v/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-e/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-s/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-g/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtpdtit-kujkulhluu-w/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Mike Thompson for Congress
( https://www.facebook.com/mikethompsonforcongress )

Peter,

Taking a step back to reflect on all I'm thankful for is
always my favorite part of this holiday. I’m more grateful than
ever to have your support, especially after our hard fought
Election Day victories.

As our communities begin to recover and rebuild after the
devastating fires, it's a great time to gather together and focus
on what's important, and to reflect on how far we've come. I'm
thankful for the spirit of community that helped us through this
hard time.

Happy Thanksgiving!
( https://www.facebook.com/mikethompsonforcongress )

I hope you have a joyful Thanksgiving, and you’re able to
spend time with the people you love.

Thanks,

Mike

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He
represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights
for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot
continue to do his crucial work without the support of people
like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thompson-emfooter?amount=25&refcode=MT_EM_EN_WL_181122_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

name: Greg Stanton
subject: give thanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I hope you have a happy Thanksgiving surrounded by loved ones!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/diikvYnVmp1c07Mmml-20UjS7mh6-h0Q8Lk8Wvp6vHE=/cFHk3ywC3XERMq9BJ2oxXnqvtDR3GLFiWMEmkMquQWA=)

name: Ted Budd
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
Friends,

It has been a busy month of August recess in the district and I am excited to get back to promoting conservative ideas in Washington. As I head back, I am proud to announce I was chosen as FreedomWorks' Member of the Month for September 2017.

Here's what they said:

"Rep. Budd was a strong proponent of repealing and replacing ObamaCare. In a press release, he said, “If history is any guide I’ll take around 2,000 votes this Congress. Most of them will be forgotten. This is not one of those votes. This vote marks the beginning of the end of Obamacare as we know it. The failure of that law can be seen in the double-digit premium increases and monopoly situation in the individual insurance market in our state.” Rep. Budd maintained a principled stance on the issue and understands the disaster that ObamaCare is for the American people.

FreedomWorks’ looks forward to working with Rep. Budd to fight for conservative principles. The August recess is coming to an end. With several congressional deadlines coming up in September, including passing a budget and and beginning work on fundamental tax reform, FreedomWorks’ anticipates the push back from the left and moderate republicans on the issues this fall, but are thankful for members like Rep. Budd who have worked hard to keep the promises on which they were elected." Read more HERE (click link insert).

I am working hard to be your voice in Washington. Thank you for your continued prayers.

Best,

Ted

You're receiving this newsletter because you have shown interest in Congressman Ted Budd.
Not interested anymore? Click here to unsubscribe:
https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMDMwMzQ0MDc2MjYxNTk0MjU5JmM9ejhlMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yMTU1MzcyNTQmZD13N3o0eTV4.y57xgbSdXN_JWQ5jlV2rn1dkR8SiKxMcu1lVxa4TNK0

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family! | | | Dear Friend, I wanted to send a quick note to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving! I hope the day brings with it an opportunity for laughter and happiness with those you cherish on this uniquely American holiday.
I remain incredibly thankful to so many in Northern Ohio who placed their continued confidence in me on Election Day this year. For all of its bumps and bruises, I love the House and this opportunity to serve. I am indeed thankful for the wisdom of our people to have restored balance in our Federal government.
Whether you walked the precincts, made calls, urged a friend to vote, or voted for the first time in a mid-term yourself, we were part of an important turning point in this chapter in America's history.
We still have so much work to do, but I thank you from the bottom of my heart for the part you play in keeping America strong. Know that I remain steadfast in my commitment to being the best Representative I can and to advance the cause of working men and women every single day I serve in the U.S. Congress.
Thank you, _Marcy_
**_[_www.marcykaptur.com_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mpss/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2ms/DaFlayaJTQqOqm8o4ejdgQ/h0/cJk-2BgUakD6U3ZmoejlXuC207xwEAKDmLodpPPVdrNN8bUTr6x7X6WrhVqTN6q8VNTiv0mciwMItxK-2FoTJonurFlh4CkZvRA52-2FbNuQyJxHsG-2FJHwcf80pNd4F3P2EEY-2BVsGDSc7RXdSciVCewZAMfP8QMJK6mUmgthqgsfCWlXNHLkztj0IMuDT77lW6xAa1eaew4QFosbBiYrU-2BAilFwkH6bOcZq-2BqIZBQEUs9IW1U-3D)_**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Have a Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
Have a wonderful Thanksgiving and don't put too much Old Bay on that turkey!
__
Friend,

Every year our family gathers around the table and we tell each other what we're thankful for. And often, I also get some pointers on carving a turkey from those a bit wiser than me. It only feels right that you're all included in the tradition as well.
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de918ef/70cdc2ba/465ff365/3904b87/2000458682/VEsH/ "https://vanhollen.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_THANKSGIVING_WL_181122_1_1&source=CVH_EM_THANKSGIVING_WL_181122_1_1")
This holiday season, I am grateful for my friends and family as well as all of our grassroots supporters who have fought tirelessly to strengthen our democracy and build a more perfect union and a more peaceful world.

Thank you for being a thoughtful, active, and engaged citizen. It's what keeps our democracy vibrant and strong.

Have a Happy Thanksgiving and don't put too much Old Bay on that turkey!

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | The truth our founding fathers understood.
---
| Peter, If you’re like me, I’m sure you’re looking forward to the big Thanksgiving meal, like the special sweet potatoes Aunt Veda makes only once a year. We all love the food, the extended family and friends, all the kids -- and in my case, that ever-growing troupe of grandkids! But perhaps my favorite moment of all comes just before the meal, when everyone comes together for a time of prayer and giving thanks to Almighty God for all He has done in the past year. **I came across this quote by G.K. Chesterton, "I would maintain that thanks are the highest form of thought, and that gratitude is happiness doubled by wonder."** Chesterton’s words still ring true today. I think we can all agree that when we reflect on everything we have – our faith, our families, God’s many blessings and this incredible country we live in – we should feel both thankful and very happy. Our Founding Fathers grasped this truth as well because even as our nation was just beginning, they believed a spirit of thankfulness must be woven into our American spirit and become part of our common traditions. Both houses of Congress requested that George Washington recommend Americans observe a day of thanksgiving and prayer. President Washington’s 1789 Thanksgiving Proclamation read: WHEREAS it is the duty of all nations to acknowledge the providence of Almighty God, to obey His will, to be grateful for His benefits, and humbly to implore His protection and favor; and whereas both Houses of Congress have, by their joint committee, requested me “to recommend to the people of the United States a day of public thanksgiving and prayer, to be observed by acknowledging with grateful hearts the many and signal favors of Almighty God, especially by affording them an opportunity peaceably to establish a form of government for their safety and happiness.

Now, therefore, I do recommend and assign Thursday, the 26th day of November next, to be devoted by the people of these States to the service of that great and glorious Being who is the beneficent author of all the good that was, that is, or that will be; that we may then all unite in rendering unto Him our sincere and humble thanks for His kind care and protection of the people of this country previous to their becoming a nation...” **As you know from Washington’s proclamation, this special day wasn’t meant to be merely a time to recite what we are thankful for. It was intended to be a day of prayers filled with thanksgiving to God.** **Washington continued:** And also that we may then unite in most humbly offering our prayers and
supplications to the great Lord and Ruler of Nations, and beseech Him to pardon our national and other transgressions; to enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our several and relative duties properly and punctually; to render our National Government a blessing to all the people by constantly being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws, discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed;

to protect and guide all sovereigns and nations (especially such as have shown kindness to us), and to bless them with good governments, peace, and concord; to promote the knowledge and practice of true religion and virtue, and the increase of science among them and us; and, generally, to grant unto all mankind such a degree of temporal prosperity as He alone knows to be best. The Founders had it right; thanksgiving and prayer are what 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18 calls us to do: **"Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus."** I pray this Thanksgiving will be a fresh reminder to us all to continually pray and give thanks for all God has given us. Happy Thanksgiving from all of us at My Faith Votes! **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181122com01&n=1)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181122com01&n=2).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181122com01&n=3) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181122com01&n=4) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181122com01&n=5)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I wish you peace and fellowship and gratitude.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2f7/c1f7015/6e1af83e/1140ddc6/2848557024/VEsH/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com") Friend, Today I am digging out my grandmother's lemon meringue pie recipe and planning Thanksgiving dinner with my family. I'm grateful not to be in charge of the main course this year, so I will focus on pie and family and friendship, and maybe a good long walk. Moose the chocolate lab puppy seems to know something is up, because he is playing with his kong with particular joy, even though the peanut butter is long gone. He's an optimist, like all puppies! Thanksgivings take lots of different forms, and I'm grateful for all of them. My brothers and their families live far away from us in Minnesota, so it is always a joy to get as many of us together as we can manage, to eat, share stories, and laugh. Our children are not all together this year, but we are exchanging pie recipes and planning virtually for our various celebrations. My niece Selma is organizing a "Friendsgiving" with her pals returned home from college for the first time. My dear friend Mark is back at home after too long a stint in the hospital, ready to celebrate with his family. And some folks will be celebrating with strangers, grateful for a hot meal, kindness, and fellowship. To all of you, in whatever form your Thanksgiving takes, I wish you peace and fellowship and gratitude. And turkey breast, we hope, that is not too dry. Tina
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2f7/c1f7015/6e1af83e/1140ddc7/2848557024/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Linda (personal)
subject: The spirit of this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
This Thanksgiving, my thoughts are with the countless families across California who have lost loved ones and remain impacted by the raging wildfires. Peter,

This Thanksgiving, my thoughts are with the countless families across California who have lost loved ones and remain impacted by the raging wildfires.

Like you, I am so grateful for the heroism of our first responders and firefighters who continue to risk their lives to save and protect our communities in harm's way.

And I am in awe of the outpouring of support our California family has shown to those who've lost so much -- neighbors sending in donations, serving meals, and offering shelter to those who've been displaced.

More than ever, it is on all of us to step up and do what we can to help those in need: [**http://ca.voteforlinda.com/fire-relief**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366a1/4ac3d62d/69e30680/1ce2a158/1617821104/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/newsomfiredonation?refcode=ls")

I can think of no better way to truly reflect the spirit of Thanksgiving.

-Linda** **
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366a1/4ac3d62d/69e30680/1ce2a159/1617821104/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

Norwalk, CA 90652

name: Congressman Bruce Westerman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | [](http://www.brucewesterman.com/?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=happy_thanksgiving&n=1)
---
Friend -- This is a wonderful time of the year, as we all come together to give thanks for the blessings God has granted to our family.

It is an honor and a privilege to continue serving you in Washington as your congressman from the 4th District of Arkansas. Sharon and I are so very thankful for the trust you have put in me to continue serving you and our country in Congress. Among the many things we are thankful for, I ask that you please join me in taking a moment to give thanks for the men and women who cannot be with their families today because they are on duty protecting us. From my family to yours, have a blessed Thanksgiving! Congressman Bruce Westerman
[http://www.brucewesterman.com/](http://www.brucewesterman.com/?e=87de312c4219248fa3631a1188a4b4f4&utm_source=westerman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=happy_thanksgiving&n=2)
---

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Our Thanksgiving tradition
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress***
body:
Happy Thanksgiving Day

>From Our Family to Yours

Cooking is a major part of my life, and cooking on Thanksgiving is more than just a standard tradition. As your "Clean Cooking Congresswoman," I wanted to share a recipe I developed with fruits and one of my favorite cooking methods- the slow cooker.

Kumquat and Cherry Chicken with Roasted Vegetables

Recipe by @cleancookingcongresswoman. Follow me on Instragram!

2 chicken (or turkey) breasts

1 green bell pepper

1 red bell pepper

10 kumquats

10 Orange Glory grape tomatoes (yellow cherry or grape tomatoes are also fine)

10 Rainier cherries

1 tbsp honey

1-2 tbsp Mina Harissa spicy sauce (depending on taste)

1/2 c water

Salt and pepper, to taste

Directions: Cut up raw chicken/turkey breast into small pieces, slice bell peppers, cut kumquats and grape tomatoes in half, and slice cherries and remove pits. Place chicken, fruit, and vegetables in slow cooker. Add honey, Mina Harissa spicy sauce, water, and salt and pepper. Mix thoroughly. Turn slow cooker on low for 4-6 hours. Stir every hour and check after 3 hours for poultry doneness. ----

***Paid for and authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress***

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe, go to:
http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I'm thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I'm thankful for you and all the others who have stood up and worked hard to create a North Carolina that works for everyone.
|

---
Friend,

Thanksgiving is a time for families and friends to come together. It's a time to think about generosity and things that we are thankful for. It's also a time to think about those in need.

This has been a difficult year for many North Carolinians. I'm thankful for all the first responders and volunteers who stepped up to help during and after the hurricanes.

I'm thankful for those who answered the call and served our country, particularly here in North Carolina where we have almost 800,000 veterans.

I'm thankful for North Carolina agriculture. Many of our farmers are having a tough time in the aftermath of Hurricane Florence and we need to do everything we can to help them.

I'm grateful for our educators -- our teachers, principals and others who work hard to make sure our kids get the quality education they deserve.

I'm grateful for the public servants in North Carolina who work so hard every day for us.

I'm thankful for you and all the others who have stood up and worked hard to create a North Carolina that works for everyone.

Thanks for all you continue to do for our state.

Happy Thanksgiving, Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

Many blessings to you and yours,

Andrew Gillum

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c5/9e00690/69d55635/2400a2ce/1118688019/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35c5/9e00690/69d55635/2400a2c1/1118688019/VEsE/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/").
clean_body: Hello -- I want to take a moment to let you know how grateful I am for your incredible support. May you enjoy fellowship and good times with your loved ones and friends as you join together for the Thanksgiving holiday. Many blessings to you and yours, Andrew Gillum Paid for by the Florida Democratic Party Florida Democratic Party 214 S. Bronough St Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from the Ryan Family!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
All is well in the Ryan household. The game is on, our plates our empty, and the fridge is full of leftovers. (I think we might be eating turkey sandwiches for weeks -- not that I'm complaining!) | |
---
Friends,

All is well in the Ryan household. Our plates are empty, the fridge is full of leftovers, and everyone has changed into pants with elastic waistbands. (I think we might be eating leftovers for weeks -- not that I'm complaining!)

Our hearts are also full of gratitude for all of life's blessings -- including your support. That's why I just wanted to take a quick break to say THANK YOU for everything you've done in the past year. You've donated to candidates around the country who helped Democrats take back the House of Representatives, and you've supported our fight for hard-working Americans. I hope that you'll also take time to think of our service members who are overseas and others who are away from their families this holiday season.

Please also consider making a donation to a worthy charity in honor of Thanksgiving. Two causes to consider:

\-- [Project Welcome Home Troops](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6064/38342312/VEsH/ "https://iahv.networkforgood.com/projects/29020-project-welcome-home-troops-main")**, which helps returning veterans address chronic and traumatic stress; and**

\-- [The David Lynch Foundation](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6067/38342312/VEsE/ "https://donate.davidlynchfoundation.org/checkout/donation?eid=130902")**, which teaches mindfulness and meditation to at-risk populations.**

Thanks again, and from our family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving!

\-- Tim, Andrea, and the Ryan Family [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6066/38342312/VEsF/ "http://timryanforcongress.com")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6069/38342312/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6068/38342312/VEsD/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf606b/38342312/VEsA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf606a/38342312/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf606d/38342312/VEsO/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6069/38342312/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90fe/5486deaa/2413454e/dcf6068/38342312/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Thanksgiving is one of my family's favorite holidays. It's a time to relax from the hectic pace of everyday life and reflect on all the things we're thankful for. A time to hang around the kitchen, sit around the table and talk about everything happening in our lives. And of course, if you're Franklin or his cousin Bing, it's a time to feast mightily on all the table scraps you can eat. |
---
**Peter, I wanted to make sure you know how grateful I am for you.** I love what I do, representing the people of Ohio in the U.S. Senate. That wouldn't be possible without your help. **Thank you for all your hard work and support over the past two years and beyond.**
From my family to yours -- have a safe and happy Thanksgiving.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd88/4462dc26/8a80a054/201f0fcb/2576167801/VEsH/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
